prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 anime-style fashion illustration of a slender androgynous young adult model in Y2K streetwear, shown from upper thighs to head in a low-angle studio photo pose. The character has messy golden blond medium-length layered hair with long face-framing strands, but the face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque beige square censor block. Pose the model with the left hand tucked in a pants pocket and the right arm raised, fingers near the ear as if adjusting an earring, giving a cool runway attitude. Include exactly 7 visible fashion elements: 1 oversized pale blue denim jacket worn open and slipping off one shoulder, 2 cropped plain white T-shirt exposing the midriff, 3 teal-blue low-rise ripped jeans, 4 black waistband with tiny abstract white markings but no readable brand logo, 5 chunky silver ear jewelry, 6 black bracelet or wrist accessory, and 7 small gold chain detail hanging from the jeans pocket. Make the jeans have exactly 3 major torn knee/thigh openings: one large rip on the left thigh, one large rip on the right thigh, and one smaller rip lower on the right leg. Use crisp high-detail Japanese anime rendering with glossy fabric highlights, sharp ink lines, warm skin shading, dramatic sunlight from above, and a bright white photography-studio background with visible black light stands, ceiling rigging, and round studio lights. Add a faint white social-media watermark across the upper hair area reading Yume@yumeK. Avoid any recognizable brand logos or real fashion trademarks.
